description: Recommandations pour le prochain run. Mis a jour par la Sentinelle au FINALIZE. Lu par /team au Step 2.

recommendations.description: Fix path-to-regexp@8.2.0 ReDoS (GHSA-j3q9-mxjg-w52f). Add pnpm.overrides to path-to-regexp@>=8.4.0 in museum-backend/package.json.
recommendations.source: R16 audit — SCAN-devops, confirmed by Sentinelle
recommendations.resolvedAt: Untracked work 2026-03-29 (commit a4dffff). Verified: path-to-regexp pinned to 8.4.0 in package.json.

recommendations.description: Fix langsmith@0.3.87 SSRF (GHSA-v34v-rq6j-cj6p). Add pnpm.overrides to langsmith@>=0.4.6 in museum-backend/package.json.
recommendations.source: R16 audit — SCAN-devops, confirmed by Sentinelle
recommendations.resolvedAt: Untracked work 2026-03-29 (commit a4dffff). Verified: langsmith pinned to >=0.4.6 in package.json.

recommendations.description: Hash password reset tokens with SHA-256 before DB storage.
recommendations.source: R16 audit — SCAN-security, upgraded to HIGH by Sentinelle
recommendations.resolvedAt: Untracked work 2026-03-29. Verified: forgotPassword.useCase.ts stores SHA-256 hash (crypto.createHash('sha256')), resetPassword.useCase.ts compares hashed token.

recommendations.description: Wire LLMCircuitBreaker into production path or remove dead code.

recommendations.resolvedAt: Untracked work 2026-03-29. Verified: imported in langchain.orchestrator.ts + api.router.ts (getLlmCircuitBreakerState).

recommendations.description: Add supertest HTTP route tests for auth + chat routes minimum.
recommendations.source: R16 audit — SCAN-tests, confirmed by Sentinelle
recommendations.resolvedAt: Untracked work 2026-03-29 (commit a4dffff). Verified: 7 route test files (admin, auth, chat, daily-art, museum, review, support), 1313 lines total.

recommendations.description: Frontend route files still bypass application layer (infrastructure imports in routes). conversations.tsx and settings.tsx now clean (R15), but other routes remain.
image-storage.s3.ts remains at 720L. Further decomposition possible but lower ROI.
recommendations.source: R15 refactor — Sentinelle REVIEW+TEST gate WARN

recommendations.description: Out-of-cycle work (35 commits, Mar 29-31) was not tracked by /team. KB and sprint docs fell 3 days behind. Process AM-010 added to prevent recurrence.
